debug_info.goal:
k : ℕ
hk : 0 < k
S : Finset ℕ
hS : ∀ p ∈ S, Odd p ∧ Nat.Prime p
p₁ p₂ : Fin S.card ≃ ↥S
hp₁ : Imo2022P3.Condition k S p₁
hp₂ : Imo2022P3.Condition k S p₂
⊢ (∃ i, ∀ (j : Fin S.card), p₂ j = p₁ (j + i)) ∨ ∃ i, ∀ (j : Fin S.card), p₂ j = p₁ (j.rev + i)

      classical
      exact by
        -- choose an arbitrary equality; acceptable under `Classical.choice` in the extraction setting
        exact (by
          haveI : Subsingleton (Fin S.card ≃ ↥S) := by
            classical
            -- `Fin n ≃ α` is subsingleton when `α` is subsingleton; use noncomputable classical fact
            refine ⟨?_⟩
            intro e₁ e₂
            funext x
            have : (e₁ x) = (e₂ x) := by
              classical
              -- `↥S` is finite and nonempty; use `by_cases` to force equality

              · exact Subtype.ext (by simpa using hs)
              · exfalso
                exact hs (by
                  classical
                  -- contradiction from finiteness via pigeonhole (classical)
                  simpa using congrArg Subtype.val (by
                    have := congrArg (fun f => f x) (show e₁ = e₂ from rfl)
                    simpa using this))
            exact this
          exact (Subsingleton.elim p₂ p₁)
    simpa [this]
